home.title: One-stop Platform for Global PPE Compliance
home.subtitle: Covers PPE compliance requirements for 30+ countries and regions including EU, USA, UK, Middle East, helping enterprises go global quickly and reduce compliance risks

features.title: Compliance Check Wizard
features.desc: Enter product information and target market, generate a complete compliance solution in 30 seconds, including certification requirements, costs, and cycle

features.title: One-click Compliance Package Generation
features.desc: Automatically generate a full set of compliance document packages, including certification requirements, test standards, and application material templates

features.title: Professional Document Template Library
features.desc: 100+ professionally reviewed compliance document templates, editable directly, saving 90% of time

features.title: Global Regulation Knowledge Base
features.desc: Real-time update of the latest global PPE regulations and standards, all content comes from official authoritative sources

success.title: Report sent successfully!

items: Complete list of required certifications and official reference links

pricing.title: Simple and Transparent Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that suits you, help your foreign trade business comply with regulations and go global. All plans include 7-day no-reason refund guarantee.

free.name: Free Plan
free.desc: Suitable for individual users and small foreign trade enterprises to try

pro.name: Pro Plan
pro.desc: Suitable for daily use of small and medium-sized foreign trade enterprises and factories

enterprise.name: Enterprise Plan
enterprise.desc: Suitable for medium and large foreign trade enterprises and certification consulting agencies

items.question: What payment methods are supported?
items.answer: Support WeChat Pay, Alipay, bank transfer, credit card payment, and formal VAT invoices can be issued.

items.question: Can I get a refund after purchase?
items.answer: 7-day no-reason refund is supported. If you encounter any problems during use, please contact our customer service team at any time.

items.question: Can I upgrade my plan?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade from Free Plan to Pro Plan, or from Pro Plan to Enterprise Plan at any time, and the cost will be converted proportionally.

items.question: Can Enterprise Plan customize functions?
items.answer: Yes, the Enterprise Plan supports customized development of exclusive functions, including docking with your enterprise ERP, CRM systems, and customized compliance report templates.

aiAssistant.title: AI Compliance Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: 24/7 online answers to all your compliance questions, supporting document review, report generation, and policy interpretation

categories.name: Compliance Consultation
categories.desc: Answer all kinds of PPE compliance related questions, including certification requirements, standard interpretation, policy consultation

categories.name: Document Review
categories.desc: Review your compliance documents, application materials, test reports, point out problems and optimization suggestions

categories.name: Report Generation
categories.desc: Generate customized compliance reports and risk assessment reports based on your product and market information

categories.name: Policy Interpretation
categories.desc: Interpret the latest national trade policies and regulation updates, and analyze the impact on your business
